prompt: A white Toyota HiLux ute with a sophisticated partial vehicle wrap featuring geometric L and K letterforms made from precise straight lines sharing a single vertical stroke. The geometric monogram is rendered in charcoal (#2C2C2C) on the front doors, large and prominent, with sharp angular lines suggesting architectural blueprints. A single thin gold (#C9A96E) accent line runs through the design. Below on the door, LK DESIGN AND BUILD in widely-spaced thin sans-serif text. The rear quarter panel shows 0401 061 246 and lkdesignandbuild.com.au in charcoal. The wrap uses a charcoal, white, and gold color scheme, clean and minimal. The ute is parked on an Adelaide suburban street with eucalyptus trees and neat houses. Bright daylight, professional vehicle photography.
negative_prompt: full wrap, busy graphics, neon colors, cheap vinyl, bubbles in wrap, dirty vehicle, ugly background, industrial area, nighttime, cartoon, illustration, ornate, decorative, low quality

settings.depth_of_field: medium, vehicle sharp, background slightly soft
